---
title: "Modernization Specs"
subtitle: "Cross-adapter technical specifications by modernization domain"
doc-type: section-landing
audience: "Modernization architects · program leads · control assessors"
canon-source: "src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml"
derived-from: "uiao canon"
aspirational: true
---

# Modernization Specs {.unnumbered}

Cross-adapter technical specifications organized by modernization domain.
Each spec captures the substrate contract, control mapping, and
integration shape that a domain must satisfy — independent of any specific
vendor adapter. Adapter-level detail lives in [Adapter
Specs](../adapter-specs/index.qmd).

## Pages in this section

| Slug | Domain | Canon anchor |
|---|---|---|
| `identity` | Identity modernization (OrgTree, dynamic groups, delegation) | `src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml#identity` |
| `cloud` | Cloud substrate and boundary | `src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml#cloud` |
| `zero-trust` | Zero-trust implementation pattern | `src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-008-zero-trust-identity.md` |
| `sase` | Secure access service edge | `src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml#sase` |
| `sdwan` | Software-defined WAN | `src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml#sdwan` |
| `telemetry` | Telemetry, evidence, and audit | `docs/docs/15_ProvenanceProfile.qmd` |
